query:
SELECT CONCAT(
  CASE WHEN wuxing_wood > 0 THEN CONCAT('木:', wuxing_wood, ' ') ELSE '' END,
  CASE WHEN wuxing_fire > 0 THEN CONCAT('火:', wuxing_fire, ' ') ELSE '' END,
  CASE WHEN wuxing_earth > 0 THEN CONCAT('土:', wuxing_earth, ' ') ELSE '' END,
  CASE WHEN wuxing_metal > 0 THEN CONCAT('金:', wuxing_metal, ' ') ELSE '' END,
  CASE WHEN wuxing_water > 0 THEN CONCAT('水:', wuxing_water) ELSE '' END
) as pattern, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM game_monster_catalog GROUP BY pattern ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 15;

  CASE WHEN wuxing_fire > 0 THEN CONCAT('火:', wuxing_fire, ' ') ELSE '' END,
  CASE WHEN wuxing_earth > 0 THEN CONCAT('土:', wuxing_earth, ' ') ELSE '' END,
  CASE WHEN wuxing_metal > 0 THEN CONCAT('金:', wuxing_metal, ' ') ELSE '' END,
  CASE WHEN wuxing_water > 0 THEN CONCAT('水:', wuxing_water) ELSE '' END
) as pattern, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM game_monster_catalog GROUP BY pattern ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 15;
